name: Analyse-des-Avis-et-Alertes-ANSSI
description: Cybersecurity project analyzing ANSSI advisories and CVEs with enriched datasets, Python scripts, and Jupyter notebooks. Includes data preprocessing, AI/game logic, and reports for vulnerability insights.

name: Atelier_Alassoeur_Website
description: A simple web project with an HTML page styled by CSS and supported by image assets. It showcases sketches, photos, and logos, serving as a lightweight visual portfolio or presentation site.

name: automata-toolkit
description: Production-grade CLI tool to parse, validate, and transform finite automata (determinization, minimization, recognition) with strong test coverage and clean architecture.

name: between-light
description: 2D arcade game prototype built with GameMaker Language.

name: binwatch
description: Full-stack smart waste monitoring app that classifies bin status from images, stores inspection history, and exposes analytics-ready data with Flask, Express, PostgreSQL, and HTML/CSS/JavaScript.

name: Boardswipe
description: BoardSwipe is an interactive web application for board game enthusiasts, allowing users to discover, rate, and share games through a swipe-based system, while connecting with a community of passionate players.

name: CanAdventure
description: A Vue.js frontend application starter with ESLint, Babel, and Tailwind CSS for scalable modern web development.

name: contact-card
description: Minimal HTML contact card / email signature with links (LinkedIn, GitHub).

name: dataviz-dashboard
description: Interactive Streamlit dashboard analyzing socio-demographic and digital factors influencing cultural consumption in France using open public data.

name: footpredict-pl
description: Premier League match prediction (Home Win) with Elo + form features, walk-forward backtesting, and Streamlit dashboard.

name: GreenEscape
description: Are you smarter than an algorithm? In this game, you're thrown into a maze. Take your time, analyze the path, then go for it and try to reach the exit as fast as possible. But be careful — you're not alone: three algorithms are racing with you… Will they be faster than you?

name: merge-tactics-optimizer
description: Deck optimizer using trait synergies (pairs ≥2) and beam search — Clash Royale-inspired.

name: ML_Football
description: A Python project for sports and data analysis using multiple Excel files. Includes a main script and datasets to test, modify, and compute results, with IDE configuration files for easy development and reproducibility.

name: morpion-ultime
description: Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe web app with AI (Minimax, Alpha-Beta, MCTS), move analysis, heatmaps and game replay.

name: network-flow-algorithms
description: Python project implementing and benchmarking network flow algorithms (Ford-Fulkerson, Push-Relabel, Min-Cost Flow) with test cases, traces, plotting, and a Tkinter GUI.

name: Puissance4
description: AI-powered Connect Four (12x6) with Minimax, alpha-beta pruning, heuristics, and real-time decision-making. Play against the AI in the console with strategic depth and optimized performance.

name: repo-audit
description: Audit any developer project ZIP (multi-stack, monorepo) and generate actionable Markdown/JSON/HTML reports with optional safe fixes.

name: school-bus-dashboard
description: Streamlit dashboard analyzing operational and environmental data related to electric school buses to support decision-making.

name: Signature-carre-des-canotiers
description: Signature email standardisée pour le Carré des Canotiers : templates HTML email-safe, assets versionnés, variantes (full/compact/texte) et guide d’intégration Gmail/Outlook + matrice de compatibilité.

name: Space-Jumper
description: Space-Jumper: a Python-based arcade game—built by Mathieu Alassoeur, Samuel Da Silva, Roland Fontanes, Max Bortolotti, and Raphaël Thebault. Run `main.py` to play. Features intuitive controls, scoring, images, and sound for an engaging experience.

name: Space_Jumper_Website
description: A static web game project with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Includes multiple pages (game, quiz, tutorial, ranking), custom styles, interactive scripts, images, and a gameplay video to provide a complete browser-based experience.

name: UML-Project
description: A Vue-based project with a Node.js backend serving dynamic content driven by `ingredients.json`. Built with `server.js`, package managed via npm. Seamlessly combines frontend (Vue, HTML, JS) and backend to deliver interactive UI backed by structured data.

name: vct-emea-kickoff-simulator
description: Streamlit app to simulate VCT EMEA Kickoff (2026) triple-elimination bracket and build an interactive worst→best team ranking.
